name: Reewa
description: Details Collection: Main Sham Hun Banaras Ki Sarees Length: 6.50 m (650.00 cm) which includes a 1.00 m (100 cm) blouse piece   Width:  1.19 m (119.38 cm)  Blouse Piece: Yes Wash Care: Dry Clean Blouse:  The model is wearing S size of blouse called Nadiya Ke Paar. Fabric: Katan Silk Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Colour may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness Note: The blouse-piece swatch is shown in the 5th image. Note: The colours of the tassels may vary  Story She was in perfect harmony with the free-flowing river, where she flowed without pretense and prepared herself to meet the sea. By and by, she realized that she herself was the sea as well! She submerged into loving, believing, and respecting herself, her past self opening her arms to her future. Maybe that was all that was needed, just a stronger drizzle for her to realize that the river and the sea were made of the same element!This beautiful, timeless handloom Katan Silk saree in maroon and mustard brings alive a whole lot of love and warmth to drape yourself with!  Description  Katan silk is a fine, soft silk made of the best of Mulberry silk fibres. It lends a very delicate, light feel to the fabric.  The brilliant shine that vibrates from this traditional hand-woven silk fabric spells utter beauty. The process of producing silk involves multiple stages such as extracting silk threads from the cocoons of silk-worms, twisting multiple silk threads to make strong threads and weaving the threads on handlooms. People associate silk with special occasions and richness. It is alluring and can boast of a grand appeal as well as a tinge of nostalgia.

name: Pink Poly Cotton Anarkali Printed Kurta Palazzo Suit Set
description: This Pink Poly Cotton Anarkali Printed Kurta Palazzo Suit Set is a stunning ensemble, ideal for women seeking a blend of semi-formal elegance and festive charm. The set features an above-knee Anarkali kurta with a V-neck and 3/4th sleeves, beautifully complemented by palazzo pants. The kurta's soft pink color is adorned with an exquisite print, adding a touch of grace and femininity to the outfit. Made from a comfortable poly cotton blend, this suit set combines durability with a luxurious feel. Accessorize with pearl earrings and pink heels to enhance the ensemble's appeal, making it a perfect choice for weddings, festive celebrations, or any event where elegance is key.

name: Mehandi Poly Cotton Anarkali Kurta Palazzo Suit Set
description: Experience the harmonious blend of cultural allure and effortless refinement in this poly-cotton Anarkali kurta and Churidar suit set. The kurta boasts a flattering V-neck and three-quarter sleeves adorned with intricate jari laces, complemented by a wide border at the hem and a captivating flower detail at the back. The front of the kurta features an enchanting lace-infused neckline with delicate beaded embellishment. Complete with a Churidar and a colored dupatta featuring a beautifully designed border, this set exudes elegance.

name: Ivory And Gold Cotton Anarkali Kurta Churidar Suit Set
description: A long length Anarkali suit set. It comprises a floral print kurta clubbed with churidar and crushed cotton dupatta. Kurta also has a hint of gold metallic print and it features round neckline with slit. Crafted in finest cotton, it feels soft to touch.

name: Cherry Red Cotton Anarkali Kurta Churidar Suit Set
description: Nourish yourself with this delightful Anarkali kurta and Churidar suit set, crafted from cotton fabric. The kurta features three-quarter sleeves, a round neck, and mesmerising shiny hand block prints throughout. It comes with a matching dupatta and a Churidar for a complete ensemble. The back of the kurta is adorned with an adjustable strap and tassels, adding a stylish touch to the front neckline. Pair this set with brass earrings, bangles, and a pair of elegant Mojaris to enhance the overall look. Treat yourself to this ensemble, perfect for various occasions and celebrations. Wash by hand in cold water using a gentle detergent.
